name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
75% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
50% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Curse, Hex

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, lowering their fire resistance and giving them a chance to be ignited when hit.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies have -37% to Fire Resistance
Hits against Cursed Enemies have +25% chance to Ignite
Ignite on Cursed enemies has 20% increased Duration
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will have a chance to be triggered when you are stunned. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods:
89% chance to Trigger Supported Spells when you are Stunned, or
Block a Stunning Hit
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Flaming bolts rain down over the targeted area. They explode when landing, dealing damage to nearby enemies.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Fire, Duration, Projectile, Orb

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a volcanic geyser at a location, which will repeatedly unleash projectiles sequentially over the surrounding area for a duration.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Added Cold Damage
explicitMods: Maximum of 6 Geysers at a time
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Valyrium
implicitMods: Bleeding cannot be inflicted on you
explicitMods: Stun Threshold is based on Energy Shield instead of Life
flavourText: They will rise and fall in fire and blood.

name: Carrion Nail
explicitMods: 24% of Damage taken Recouped as Life

name: Nebulis
explicitMods: 10% increased Elemental Damage per 1% Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance above 75%
flavourText: The vastness of the cosmos holds energies beyond comprehension,
should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 271 to 407 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 13 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants armour to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 1077 additional Armour
You and nearby allies gain 50% more Armour
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that reserve life or mana to create auras around you.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 24% increased Aura effect

Supported Skills also count as Blessing Skills
You can only have one Aura on you from your Blessing Skills
Your Non-Blessing Skills which Reserve Mana are Disabled while you have an Aura from a Supported Skill on you
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Ralakesh's Impatience
explicitMods: Corrupted Blood cannot be inflicted on you
Count as having maximum number of Endurance Charges
flavourText: The Master of a Million Faces lived by one
simple ethos: why make the effort, when
you can simply mimic what others have?

socketedItems.secDescrText: Ethereal weapons rain from the sky, dealing damage to enemies in a sequence of volleys, each wider and more damaging than the last. Enemies can be hit multiple times where these overlap.
explicitMods: 25% increased Critical Strike Chance per Volley
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Physical, Chaos, Orb

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a Void Sphere which Hinders enemies in an area around it, with the debuff being stronger on enemies closer to the sphere. It also regularly releases pulses of area damage. The Void Sphere will consume the corpses of any enemies which die in its area. Can only have one Void Sphere at a time.
explicitMods: 40% of Physical Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
Enemies in range are Hindered, with up to 30% reduced Movement Speed, based on distance from the Void Sphere
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Lightning, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: An expanding wave of energy surges forward, damaging enemies in a cone-shaped area over a duration. Each enemy hit is inflicted with Exposure matching the element of which they took the highest damage. Only one Wave of Conviction can be active at a time
explicitMods: Damage Penetrates 15% of Enemy Elemental Resistances
25% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
25% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
Exposure applies -15% to Elemental Resistance matching highest Damage taken
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Azadi Crest
implicitMods: You take 30% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes
explicitMods:
Your Lucky or Unlucky effects use the best or
worst from three rolls instead of two
flavourText: "Keita expects an assassination attempt by stealth or subterfuge.
I say we attack head-on, like madmen. Let the fates decide."
- Azadi, first ancestor of the House Azadin

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 76% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
explicitMods: Buff grants +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while holding a Shield
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Resistance Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

implicitMods: 0.4% of Fire Damage Leeched as Life

explicitMods: Adds 5 to 10 Physical Damage to Attacks

explicitMods: Minions have 15% chance to deal Double Damage

explicitMods: Gain 24% of Missing Unreserved Life before being Hit by an Enemy
flavourText: The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.
